context.audience: Python developers building high-performance APIs, ML engineers exposing models as REST endpoints, backend developers choosing between Django and FastAPI for new projects
pain_points: Structuring large FastAPI applications beyond single-file examples
Managing async database access and connection pooling at scale
Deploying FastAPI behind reverse proxies with proper WebSocket and streaming support
Integrating LLM inference endpoints with streaming responses and backpressure
Authentication and authorization patterns without Django's built-in user model
monetization: Course content for Python API development
content_that_works: FastAPI vs Django REST Framework comparisons
